messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Analytics Cloud

### Analytics Instance

```hcl
resource "oci_analytics_analytics_instance" "analytics" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-analytics"

  feature_set = "STANDARD"

  capacity {
    capacity_type = "OLP"
    capacity_value = 1
  }

  idcs_access_token = var.idcs_token
}
```

### Capacity Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| OLP | Online Processing |
| VCN | Virtual Cloud Network |

### Network Endpoint

```hcl
resource "oci_analytics_analytics_instance" "private" {
  # ...

  network_endpoint_details {
    network_endpoint_type = "PRIVATE"
    subnet_id = oci_core_subnet.analytics_subnet.id
  }
}
```

### Use Cases

- BI reporting
- Dashboards
- Data visualization
